creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
This is a new port of sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-agent, a MCollective plugin.

Redports build reports: https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140313144039-42940/

Fix: Shar archive attached.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Use the shar archive, test the port, commit.
